---
title: "Learning Calculus"
---

Interactive calculus lecture notes with video and Desmos graphs.

## Lessons

| Date | Topic |
|------|-------|
| Aug 19 | [Lesson 1](lessons/calculus20250819.qmd) |
| Aug 21 | [Lesson 2](lessons/calculus20250821.qmd) |
| Aug 25 | [Lesson 3](lessons/calculus20250825.qmd) |
| Aug 28 | [Lesson 4](lessons/calculus20250828.qmd) |
| Sep 01 | [Lesson 5](lessons/calculus20250901.qmd) |
| Sep 05 | [Lesson 6](lessons/calculus20250905.qmd) |
| Sep 11 | [Lesson 7](lessons/calculus20250911.qmd) |
| Sep 15 | [Lesson 8](lessons/calculus20250915.qmd) |
| Sep 18 | [Lesson 9](lessons/calculus20250918.qmd) |
| Sep 22 | [Lesson 10](lessons/calculus20250922.qmd) |
| Sep 25 | [Lesson 11](lessons/calculus20250925.qmd) |
| Sep 29 | [Lesson 12](lessons/calculus20250929.qmd) |
| Oct 02 | [Lesson 13](lessons/calculus20251002.qmd) |
| Oct 06 | [Lesson 14](lessons/calculus20251006.qmd) |
| Oct 09 | [Lesson 15](lessons/calculus20251009.qmd) |
| Oct 13 | [Lesson 16a](lessons/calculus20251013_1.qmd) |
| Oct 13 | [Lesson 16b](lessons/calculus20251013_2.qmd) |
| Oct 16 | [Lesson 17](lessons/calculus20251016.qmd) |
| Oct 20 | [Lesson 18](lessons/calculus20251020.qmd) |
| Oct 23 | [Lesson 19a](lessons/calculus20251023.qmd) |
| Oct 23 | [Lesson 19b](lessons/calculus20251023_2.qmd) |
| Oct 27 | [Lesson 20](lessons/calculus20251027.qmd) |
| Oct 30 | [Lesson 21](lessons/calculus20251030.qmd) |
| Nov 03 | [Lesson 22](lessons/calculus20251103.qmd) |
| Nov 06 | [Lesson 23](lessons/calculus20251106.qmd) |
